message:
feat(tui): board box-drawing cards, PageRank/Blockers sort, visual polish

Board mode:
- Lane headers use box-drawing characters (┌─) for visual structure
- Cards use │ border with ▶ for selected, showing assignee
- Lane footers use └─── closing border
- Empty lanes show (empty) inside border

Sort modes expanded from 5 to 7:
- New: PageRank (descending) — sort by graph centrality
- New: Blockers (descending) — sort by how many issues this blocks
- Cycle: s key cycles through all 7 modes

These are concrete TUI UX improvements toward visual parity with the
mature Go bv interactive experience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
